items.title: Cuba’s blackouts leave high-rise residents with constant uncertainty
items.dek: Will Grant spoke to a 70-year-old widow who says the inability to use her building's elevator during a power outage trapped her and her husband when he needed m
items.body: Will Grant spoke to a 70-year-old widow who says the inability to use her building's elevator during a power outage trapped her and her husband when he needed medical care.

items.title: How Putin became master of the image
items.dek: From enigmatic KGB agent to wartime ruler, this is how Putin has repeatedly reinvented his image, and himself.
items.body: From enigmatic KGB agent to wartime ruler, this is how Putin has repeatedly reinvented his image, and himself.
